data.title: SlowMist: zkLend attackers used the special mechanism of flash loans to withdraw funds through rounding loopholes to obtain assets beyond their expectations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: zkLend, the leading lending platform on the Starknet chain, was previously attacked and lost assets worth nearly 10 million US dollars. SlowMist analyzed that the core of this attack was that the attacker used the special mechanism in the flash loan to manipulate and amplify the value of the accumulator in the empty market, so that when withdrawing money, he could use the rounding loophole to obtain assets beyond expectations. It is recommended that the project party design a reasonable and safe flash loan logic model, take into account the situation that affects the calculation of the number of deposit certificate tokens, and implement a safe rounding mechanism in mathematical operations to prevent precision loss. In addition, for core business logic involving deposits and withdrawals, audits and security tests should be strengthened to avoid similar situations.

data.title: Avenir Group Holds $599 Million In BlackRock Bitcoin ETF
data.description: According to Foresight News, Hong Kong-based family office Avenir Group has reported holding $599 million in BlackRock Bitcoin ETF.

data.title: GoPlus Issues Security Alert for Wallet Users
data.description:
According to Foresight News, GoPlus has issued a security alert urging users to check their wallets for any gas transfers from hacker addresses. Users are advised to promptly transfer their assets and switch to a secure wallet. GoPlus has identified and blacklisted the addresses associated with the attackers. Notably, the attackers have used a wallet starting with 0x9AE to send gas to multiple addresses, but no token transfers have occurred yet, giving users a chance to secure their assets.

The address used by the attackers to distribute gas is 0x9AEf1CA082c17f9D52Aa98ca861b50c776dECC35. The addresses used for consolidating stolen funds are as follows:

1. 0x49add3e8329f2a2f507238b0a684d03eae205aab

2. 0x7831d05afc72a10bd475eb4777680b4e9204695a

3. 0xb312a2c9ab9700dac49798f457b4c28e28f1c4fc

4. 0xc657b6e6c59af5bcff4de626dab52832e77d2996

data.title: Starknet's zkLend Suffers Major Security Breach
data.description:
According to Odaily, the leading lending platform on the Starknet chain, zkLend, recently experienced a security breach resulting in the loss of nearly ten million dollars in assets. The analysis by SlowMist indicates that the attack exploited a specific mechanism within flash loans, manipulating the value of accumulators in the empty market. This allowed the attacker to exploit a rounding vulnerability during withdrawals to gain more assets than expected.

Experts recommend that project developers design a secure and logical model for flash loans, considering the impact on the calculation of deposit certificate tokens. Implementing a safe rounding mechanism in mathematical operations is advised to prevent precision loss. Additionally, it is crucial to enhance auditing and security testing for core business logic involving deposits and withdrawals to prevent similar incidents in the future.

data.title: Binance Enhances Token Transparency with Upgraded Market Cap Methodology
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance updates token data methodology to include token unlock schedules, offering more transparent market capitalization metrics.Introduction of Unlocked Market Cap, differentiating tradable circulating supply from future unlocked tokens.Users can now track token unlock schedules directly on Binance’s platform for better-informed trading decisions.Why the Change?Traditional market cap calculations do not account for future token unlocks, potentially misleading investors about supply dynamics and price behaviour. Binance’s new methodology bridges this gap by introducing:Market Cap (Old Methodology)Value of only the currently circulating tokens.Formula: Circulating Supply × Current Price.Unlocked Market Cap (New Methodology)Value of all unlocked tokens, including those not yet publicly traded.More accurate for assessing future supply impact on prices.Circulating Supply vs. Unlocked Circulating SupplyCirculating Supply: Tokens are publicly available and tradable.Unlocked Circulating Supply: Tokens unlocked but not yet on the market.How This Benefits Binance UsersClearer Valuation: Investors get a realistic understanding of a token’s true market cap.Informed Trading: Users can anticipate future supply changes impacting price and liquidity.Improved Transparency: Binance provides direct access to unlock schedules for listed tokens.Where to Find It?Updated market cap and circulating supply data on Binance’s website and app.Token unlock schedules are displayed directly to help traders track future supply changes.Final Thoughts- Binance’s commitment to transparency ensures users stay ahead in the evolving crypto landscape.- With enhanced market data, traders can make smarter, data-driven decisions.- Stay tuned for more innovations as Binance continues leading the industry in actionable crypto insights. 🚀

data.title: Crypto ATM operator Localcoin expands into Hong Kong market, deploys 31 Bitcoin ATMs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency ATM operator Localcoin announced that it has expanded into the Hong Kong market and has deployed 31 Bitcoin ATMs. The company has previously deployed 93 Bitcoin ATMs in Australia and New Zealand. As of now, its network has expanded to 517 locations worldwide. (prnewswire)

data.title: Soter Insure, a digital asset insurance service provider, completes Series A financing led by Galaxy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Soter Insure, a digital asset insurance provider incubated by Further Ventures and WebN Group, has completed its Series A financing, led by Galaxy, with participation from Brevan Howard Digital, Karatage, Token Bay, Pharsalus, etc. The specific investment amount has not yet been disclosed. Soter Insure mainly provides digital asset insurance products in the Web3 market for financial institutions, covering areas such as smart contract failures. The new funds will be used to expand the product range. (prnewswire)

data.title: BitMEX launches $BROCCOLI perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, BitMEX announced the launch of $BROCCOLI perpetual contract, supporting up to 50 times leverage.

data.title: Elizabeth Warren slams Musk for dismantling CFPB, says only Congress has the power to shut down the agency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News B As the CFPB layoffs and crypto regulation controversy heat up, U.S. Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren accused Musk and Trump of dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) for financial control. Warren said in an interview: "The CFPB was created by Congress, and only Congress, not Musk or Trump, has the power to close it. Musk's actions against the CFPB are like bank robbers." The CFPB was previously promoted by Elizabeth Warren in 2007 and suffered another wave of layoffs on February 13. About 100 employees received layoff notices. This move is included in the agenda of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) workforce optimization plan led by Musk. BlockBeats previously reported that on February 8, Russell Watt, director of the U.S. Office of Management and Budget (OMB), took over as acting director of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), and officials from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) led by Elon Musk took over and deleted the CFPB's X account that night. Musk tweeted "CFPB RIP" on the X platform on Friday afternoon with a tombstone emoji. The homepage of the CFPB official website shows a "404 page does not exist" error message, but the rest of the website is still accessible. Sources said that officials from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) have obtained management rights to the CFPB system, including the content management system, website backend, and personnel active directory. The current atmosphere inside the CFPB is "full of frustration and anger." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain’s transaction fees surpassed Solana yesterday, and the total amount is more than five times that of Ethereum
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nansen data shows that BNB Chain's daily transaction fees exceeded US$5.8 million yesterday, surpassing Solana's US$3.3 million, and the total is more than five times that of Ethereum. This is the first time since Halloween 2024 that other blockchains besides Ethereum and Solana have led the entire industry in daily transaction fees. Most of BNB Chain's activity comes from PancakeSwap, a DEX that runs on multiple chains, but most of its trading volume comes from BNB Chain. In addition, PancakeSwap ranked first in trading volume among all chain DEXs yesterday. (Cointelegraph)
